SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service

Interface ReportImageService

All Known Implementing Classes:
ReportImageServiceImpl
public interface ReportImageService
Service interface for report image business logic operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteImage(UUID externalKey, UUID imageId)
    Deletes an image belonging to an issue report.
    ReportImage
    getImage(UUID externalId, UUID imageId)
    Retrieves a specific image from an issue report.
    Resource
    getImageFile(String key)
    Retrieves the raw image file associated with a stored image.
    ReportImage
    uploadImage(UUID externalKey, MultipartFile file)
    Uploads an image file and creates a corresponding ReportImage metadata entry.

  • Method Details

    • getImage

      ReportImage getImage(UUID externalId, UUID imageId)
      Retrieves a specific image from an issue report.
      Parameters:
      externalId - The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
      imageId - The external ID (UUID) of the image.
      Returns:
      The requested report image.

    • uploadImage

      ReportImage uploadImage(UUID externalKey, MultipartFile file) throws IOException, HttpMediaTypeException
      Uploads an image file and creates a corresponding ReportImage metadata entry.

      The uploaded file is validated, stored using the configured StorageService, and the generated storage key is saved as the image locator. Only the report owner may upload images.

      Parameters:
      externalKey - The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
      file - The uploaded image file.
      Returns:
      The newly created ReportImage metadata.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs while storing the file.
      HttpMediaTypeException - If the uploaded file's MIME type is not allowed.

    • getImageFile

      Resource getImageFile(String key) throws IOException
      Retrieves the raw image file associated with a stored image.

      This method is used by the controller to serve the actual binary image data to the client. The returned Resource may represent a file on disk or another storage backend.

      Parameters:
      key - The storage key (typically the generated filename) used to locate the file.
      Returns:
      A Resource representing the stored image file.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the file cannot be retrieved from storage.

    • deleteImage

      void deleteImage(UUID externalKey, UUID imageId) throws IOException
      Deletes an image belonging to an issue report.

      This operation removes both the metadata entry and the underlying stored file. Only the report owner or a manager may delete images.

      Parameters:
      externalKey - The external ID (UUID) of the issue report.
      imageId - The external ID (UUID) of the image to delete.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs while deleting the stored file.
